name: Ice-Cream Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Split sponge cake layer into 2 layers.
2. Spread bottom cake layer with favorite ice cream; top with second cake layer.
3. Sprinkle with fruit sugar and salted pecans or almonds. Pass chocolate sauce.
MELBA CAKE:
1. Spoon 1 quart (32 oz.) ice cream onto sponge cake layer or square; top with PARTY ICE-CREAM CAKE:
a. Two days ahead: Press 1 quart (32 oz.) vanilla ice cream into wax paper-lined 9-inch layer pan; freeze.
b. Day ahead: Whip 1 cup heavy cream. Split 1 9-inch plain cake layer into 2 layers, place one layer on wax paper, and place ice cream layer on top; spread with ¼ cup jelly, jam, or drained canned crushed pineapple; top with second cake layer.
c. Quickly spread sides of cake with whipped cream; on top, spread a thin layer of jelly; then decorate the cake with whipped cream in a pastry tube. Freeze until cream is set; freezer-wrap and freeze.
4. To serve, thaw in refrigerator about 1 hour.
5. CHOCOLATE RIPPLE: Spoon 1 quart (32 oz.) pistachio ice cream onto chocolate cake layer; drizzle chocolate sauce over ice cream.
6. SWEETHEART CAKE: In two wax paper-lined heart-shaped layer pans, bake cake made from cake mix. Cool, remove from pans. Press 1 quart (32 oz.) raspberry sherbet into the same wax paper-lined pans; freeze. Unmold each sherbet layer onto one cake layer and set one on top of the other. Freeze-wrap and freeze. To serve, thaw in refrigerator about 1 hour, then frost sides with 1 quart (32 oz.) heavy cream, whipped.
